params.name: Paris Agreement
params.description: The Paris Agreement aims to strengthen the global response to climate change, control the trend of global average temperature rise, and build a fair, reasonable, and cooperative global climate governance system, ensuring the participation of all countries in facing climate change together. This agreement represents a turning point in global environmental action, involving not only emission reduction targets but also adaptation to climate change, financial support, technology development and tran …
